title: black clean windcharge
description: This texture pack for Minecraft changes the Wind Charge to a darker style, making it black with gray details while keeping the original texture design.
body: Wind Charge rework: The Wind Charge has been completely redesigned with a darker aesthetic. It now features a black base color with subtle gray detailing while keeping the original shape and texture style intact. This gives the item a more intense, stealth-like appearance in-game. The update is purely visual and does not change gameplay mechanics, hitbox, or behavior—only its look has been modified to better fit darker or more atmospheric resource packs.
